raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet varriſim pehz wiſſu
to Wahrdu/ kas no muhsas Mut-
tes irr iſgahjis/ un kwehpinaſim
tai Debbes Meleketei/ un Dſex-
xamo Uppurus winnai uppure-
fim/ itt ka mehs eſtim darriſtchi
paschi/ un muhfo Tehwi/ muh-
fo Kehnini/ un muhfo Leel-Kun-
gi eekſch teem Pilsfahteem Ju-
da/ un Jerusalemes Gelâs/ tad
tappam mehs ar Maisi pee-eh-
dinatt/ un bijam lihgymi/ un ne
redſejam Launu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet no ta Vriſcha/ ka
mehs eſſam mittejſcheeſtai Deb-
bes Meleketei kwehpinaht/ un
winnai Dſexxamo-Uppurus up-
pureht/ tad irr nuums wiſſahds
Truhkums bijis/ un eſſam zaar
Sohbinu un zaar Baddu fa-
maitati.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir kad mehs tai Debbes
Meleketei kwehpinajam/ un win-
nai Dſexxamo-Uppurus uppure-
jam/ arrig tad mehs bes muh-
fu Wihru Sinnaſ to darram?
ka mehs ar Karraſchahm winnu
gohdinajam/ un Dſexxamo-Up-
purus uppurejam ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Jeremijus
uhs wiſſeem Laudim/ uhs Wiḫ-
reem/ un uhs Seewahm/ un uhs
wiſſeem Laudim/ kas winnam to
Wahrdu bij atbildejschi/ un
fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi tas KUNGS irr
peeminnejs/ un irr winnam Sir-
di nahkuſi ta kwehpinaſhana/
ko juhs eſat kwehpinaſchi eekſch
teem Pilsfahteem Juha/ un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ka tas KUNGS ne
warreja wairs to pazeest ta Lau-
numa deht juhsu Darrischanu/
un tahs Negantibas deht/ ko
juhs darrijat. Tadeht irr juhsa
Semme tappuft par pohtu
Weetu/ un par Istruhzinaſcha-
nu/ un par Lahstu/ ka neweens
eekſch tahs dsihwo/ itt ka tas
ſchodeen irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ka juhs eſat
kwehpinaſtchi/ un ka juhs prett to
KUNGU eſat grehkoſchi/ un ne
klaufiſchi ta KUNGA Balk-
nim/ neds staigaiſchi winna
Bauslibâ/ un winna Likkumôs/
un winna Leezibâs/ tadeht irr
jums ſchis Lannums notizzis/
itt ka tas ſchodeen irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wehl fazzija Jeremijus
uhs wiſſeem Laudim/ un uhs
wiſſahm Seewahm: Klauſast ta
KUNGA Wahrdu/ wiſſa Ju-
da/ kas Egiptes-Semne irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta runna tas KUNGS
Zebgot/ tas Israëta Deews/ un
faken: Juhs/ un juhsa Seewas
eſat ar juhsahm Muttehm run-
najſchi/ un ar juhsahm Rohkahm
peeptuſtchi/ un fazzijſtchi: Mehs
turreſtim muhsas Apſobliſcha-
nas/ ko mehs eſtim apſoblijſcht/
ka mehs kwehpinajam tai Deb-
bes Meleketei/ un Dſexxamo-
Uppurus winnai uppurejam.
Nu tad/turratj ſipri juhsas Ap-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
